title: Improved Edge
effect: Choose one of your Edge stats that is 0. It increases to 1. Enabler. Improved Gravity Cleave (9 Intellect points): You can harm a group of targets within long range by rapidly increasing gravity’s pull on one portion of each target and decreasing it on another, inflicting 6 points of damage. The targets must be within immediate range of each other. Action.
